privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated briefing document (glacier_briefing.txt) that explicitly mandates a 50m flight altitude and 80% for both frontal and side overlaps. The required target plan path (/home/ga/Documents/QGC/glacier_survey.plan), as well as the expected tolerances for scoring (+/- 5m altitude and +/- 5% overlap), exactly match the task description and verification scripts.
